title: faba bona subsp. minuta
intro: Faba bona subsp. minuta is a subspecies of the Faba bona plant, commonly known as the 'small faba bean' or 'Egyptian kidney bean'. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Faba bona subsp. minuta has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, due to its health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The plant is used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and poultices, to extract its medicinal properties and provide relief from various ailments.
